tours.title: Morning Farm Walk
tours.description: Start your day with a peaceful walk through the farm. Visit the vegetable gardens, fruit orchards, and enjoy the fresh morning air.

tours.title: Harvest Experience
tours.description: Get your hands dirty! Pick your own fruits and vegetables straight from the field, and learn organic farming techniques from Uncle Voo himself.

tours.title: Animal Feeding Adventure
tours.description: Meet our friendly farm animals! Feed the goats, collect eggs from the chicken coop, and learn about sustainable animal care.
